title: dryopteris intermedia f. fructuosa
intro: Dryopteris intermedia f. fructuosa, also known as the fructuosum fern, is a subspecies of the Dryopteris intermedia fern species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional medicine for various health benefits. The fructuosum fern is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the fructuosum fern is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
